Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 094 [price forecasts][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

šum₄-ma a-na KI GANBA še-im MEa GARan

(o 1) If you (want to) make a prediction for the zodiacal sign of the price of barley: (gloss: break) you seek the movements of the planets and you observe the appearance (and) disappearance, the last visibility, the opposition (and) conjunction, the faintness and brilliance of the planets and constellations at maximum and minimum latitude, during the(ir) risings. You make a prediction for your year and it will go well.

o 22

ḫi-pi₂DU dUDU.IDIM-MEŠ KIN.KIN-ma IGI.DU₈.A ⸢TUM₃⸣ ne₂-met-tu₄ LA₃-tu₄

o 33

TEtu₄ un-nu-tu₄ u₃ ŠE.ER.ZI ša₂ dUDU.IDIM-MEŠ u lu₂-maš₂ ša₂ NIM

o 44

u SIG ina ŠA₃ MU₂u₂ URU₃-a ana MU.AN.NA-ka MEa GAR-ma SILIMim

o 55

gi-na-a mul₂BABBAR ina mul₂UR.A mul₂PA.BIL.SAG DAL.BAN mul₂SUḪUR.MAŠ₂ u₃

(o 5) Normally (if) the White Star (Jupiter) is in the Lion, Pabilsag, between the Goatfish and the Great One, and in the region of the Bristle and the Bull of Heaven: there will be surplus business.

o 66

mul₂GU.LA u₃ KI MUL₂.MUL₂ u mul₂GU₄.AN.NA GANBA ut-tar u₃ ina LU₂.MAŠ₂

(o 6) And (if) it is in any of the (other) zodiacal signs: business will decrease. And (if) Saturn is from the Crab to Pablisag: it will be surplus. From the Goatfish to the Great Twins it will decrease. The crossing of Mars with it will not ....

o 77

gi-mir-šu₂-nu GANBA LA₂ṭi u₃ SAG.UŠ TA mul₂ALLA EN mul₂PA.BIL.SAG

o 88

ut-tar ul-tu mul₂<<MAŠ₂>>.SUḪUR.MAŠ₂ EN mul₂MAŠ.<<MAŠ>>.TAB.BA GAL.<GAL> LA₂ṭi

o 99

e-te-qu ša₂ dṣal-bat-an KI-šu₂ NU RI Aʾ šum-ma ina KI DUR GANBA mul₂BABBAR1

(o 9) If the White Star (Jupiter) in the zodiacal sign of a surplus in business either is at maximum latitude and Mars, the young man, is at Jupiter's minimum latitude (and) disappears completely from the sky, or (Jupiter) is at minimum latitude: business will greatly increase and the people will swear justice.

o 1010

lu-u NIM DAB u₃ dṣal-bat-an ŠUL SIG mul₂U₄.AL.TAR!(KUL) DAB ina gi-mir

o 1111

<<ana>> ANe TUM₃ lu-u₂ šu-pul ṣa-bit GANBA ma-gal DUR-ma UN-MEŠ

o 1212

kit-tu₄ i-ta-mu šum-ma mul₂BABBAR SIG lu-u₂ šu-pul ṣa-bit u₃ lu-u₂

(o 12) If the White Star (Jupiter) is faint or is at minimum latitude, or disappears and Mars is bright or at maximum latitude, or Mars and the White Star are in conjunction: business will greatly reduce and the people will see severe hunger.

o 1313

TUM₃ u₃ dṣal-bat-an KUR₄ lu-u₂ NIM DAB u₃ lu-u₂ AN mul₂BABBAR LAL₂

o 1414

GANBA ma-gal TUR-ma UN-MEŠ SU.GU₇ dan-nu IGI-MEŠ

o 1515

dṣal-bat-an KI SAG.UŠ ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃

(o 15) (If) Mars with Saturn, ditto.

o 1616

* 30!(20) ina KI kurURIki U₄ 1-KAM IGI-ma ba-il₃ u₃ U₄ 14-KAM₂ ina IGI dUTU GUB

(o 16) If the Moon appears on the 1st day in the land of Akkad's zodiacal sign and is bright, and stands in front of the Sun on the 14th day: in the land of Akkad business will increase.

o 1717

<<GUB>> ina kurURIki GANBA DUR

o 1818

* U₄ 30-KAM₂ IGI-ma SIG U₄ 13-KAM₂ lu U₄ 14-KAM₂ GUB GANBA LA₂ṭi ana KUR

(o 18) (If) it appears on the 30th day and is faint, (and) stands (in front of the Sun) on the 13th day or the 14th day: business will decrease. For all the lands with (their) zodiacal signs: ditto.

o 1919

DU₃.A.BI KI KI-MEŠ ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃

o 2020

* 30!(20) ina KI kurURIki NIM KASKAL DAB ina kurURIki GANBA DUR

(o 20) (If) the Moon is at (its) path's maximum latitude in the land of Akkad's zodiacal sign: in the land of Akkad business will increase.

o 2121

* šu-pul KASKAL ṣa-bit GANBA LA₂ṭi a-[na] KUR DU₃.A.BI KI KI-MEŠ ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃

(o 21) (If) it is at (its) path's minimum latitude: busines will decrease. For all the lands with (their) zodiacal signs: ditto.

o 2222

šum-ma AN.GE₆ GARun mul₂BABBAR SIG ina kur⸢URI⸣ki SU.GU₇

(o 22) If an eclipse takes place (and) the White Star (Jupiter) is faint: hunger in the land of Akkad.

o 2323

šum-ma ddele-bat un-nu-tu ina kurELAM.MAki SU.GU₇

(o 23) If (an eclipse takes place and) Venus is faint: hunger in the land of Elam.

o 2424

šum-ma dGU₄.U₄ un-nu-tu ina kurMARki SU.GU₇

(o 24) If (an eclipse takes place and) Mercury is faint: hunger in the land of Amurru.

o 2525

šum-ma dṣal-bat-an-nu un-nu-tu ina kurSU.BIR₄ki SU.GU₇

(o 25) If (an eclipse takes place and) Mars is faint: hunger in the land of Subartu.

o 2626

šum-ma dSAG.UŠ LA₂ mul₂RIN₂ SIG ina KUR DU₃.A.BI SU.GU₇2

(o 26) If Saturn is in conjunction (and) the Scales are faint: hunger in all the lands. In all the lands the merchant will be diminished.

o 2727

lu₂DAM.GAR₃ ina KUR DU₃.A.BI LA₂i

o 2828

U₄-MEŠ ddele-bat u dGU₄.U₄ UM.ME.A maš-a-al-tu₄ * mul₂SAG.ME.GAR

(o 28) The days of Venus and Mercury, experts (and) questioning.

(o 28) (If) Jupiter begins extraction in the Crab and ends in the Lion: goodness for the land of Akkad. The land of Akkad will enjoy good business. Hunger in Elam.

o 2929

TA mul₂ALLA ni-is-ḫu u₂-šar-re-e-ma a-na mul₂UR.A u₂-qat-[tu-u₂]

o 3030

dum-qi₂ ana kurURIki GANBA SIG₅ kurURIki GU₇ SU.GU₇ ina kurELAM.[MAki]

Reverse
r 1r 1

TA qi₂-ti mul₂UR.GU.LA qaq-qar mul₂AB.SIN₂ mul₂GIŠ.RIN₂ [...]

(r 1) From the end of the Lion, the sign of the Furrow, the Scales [...]: in the land of Akkad business will decrease. In the land of Elam business will expand.

r 22

ina kurURIki GANBA LA₂ṭi ina kurELAM.MAki GANBA i-nap-pu-[uš]

r 33

TA qi₂-ti mul₂GIR₂.TAB a-di qi₂-ti mul₂PA.BIL.SAG ina kurURIki GANBA GI.NA

(r 3) From the end of the Scorpion until the end of Pabilsag: in the land of Akkad business will be stable. There will be hunger in the land of Amurru.

r 44

SU.GU₇ ina kurMARki GAL₂ši TA qi₂-ti mul₂PA.BIL.SAG a-di

(r 4) From the end of Pabilsag until the Goatfish: in the land of Akkad business will decrease. In the land of Subartu business will expand.

r 55

mul₂SUḪUR.MAŠ₂ku₆ ina kurURIki GANBA LA₂ṭi ina kurSU.BIR₄ki GANBA

r 66

i-nap-pu-uš TA KUN SUḪUR.MAŠ₂ku₆ EN mul₂GU.LA ina kurURIki GANBA GAL₂ši

(r 6) From the tail of the Goatfish until the Great One: in the land of Akkad business will exist.

r 77

TA mul₂GU.LA a-di KUN mul₂ḪUN.GA₂ u₂-qat-tu-u₂ GANBA LA₂ṭi

(r 7) From the Great One until the tail of the Hireling is finished: business will decrease.

r 88

TA qi₂-ti mul₂ḪUN.GA₂ a-di MUL₂.MUL₂ mul₂GU₄.AN.NA GANBA GAL₂ši

(r 8) From the end of the Hireling until the Bristle (and) the Bull of Heaven: business will exist.

r 99

TA qi₂-ti mul₂GU₄.AN.NA EN mul₂SIPA.ZI.AN.NA mul₂MAŠ.TAB.BA GAL.GAL

(r 9) From the end of the Bull of Heaven until Orion, the Great Twins, and the Crab: there will be severe hunger.

r 1010

u mul₂ALLA SU.GU₇ dan-nu GAL₂ši

r 1111

* mul₂UDU.IDIM.SAG.UŠ ina ŠA₃ mul₂GIŠ.RIN₂ IGI-ma SA₅ dum-qi₂ ša₂ kurURIki

(r 11) (If) Saturn appears inside the Scales and is red: goodness for the land of Akkad. The land of Akkad will enjoy good business.

r 1212

GANBA SIG₅ <<ša₂>> kurURIki GU₇ TA mul₂GIŠ.RIN₂ EN mul₂SUḪUR.MAŠ₂ku₆

(r 12) From the Scales until the Goatfish: it will decrease (to) a third of its sūtu-measure.

r 1313

šal-šu₂ ša₂ gišBAN₂-šu₂ <<ša₂>> LA₂ṭi TA mul₂SUḪUR.MAŠ₂ EN mul₂ḪUN.GA₂

(r 13) From the Goatfish until the Hireling: it will decrease (to) 2 hands.

r 1414

2 ŠU-MIN-MEŠ LA₂ṭi TA mul₂ḪUN.GA₂ a-di mul₂ALLA šal-šu₂ ša₂ gišBAN₂-šu₂

(r 14) From the Hireling until the Crab: it will remain at one-third of its sūtu-measure.

r 1515

uḫ-ḫar TA mul₂ALLA EN mul₂GIŠ.RIN₂ 2ta ŠU-MIN ša₂ gišBAN₂-šu₂ uḫ-ḫar

(r 15) From the Crab until the Scales: it will remain at 2 hands of its sūtu-measure.

r 1616

ina mul₂GIŠ.RIN₂ ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂u bi-rit ma-la-ka ṣa-bit gišBAN₂-<šu₂> ḫi-pi₂

(r 16) In the Scales (gloss: new break) and keeping within the ecliptic: its sūtu-masure (gloss: break).

r 1717

* mul₂ṣal-bat-an-nu IGI-ma SA₅ u ina IGI mul₂SAG.<ME.GAR> ḫi-pi₂

(r 17) (If) Mars appears and is red, and in front of Jupiter (gloss: break) will be in the land of Akkad.

r 1818

ina kurURIki GAL₂ši DUku ša₂ gi-na mul₂<x> ḫi-pi₂

(r 18) Normal movement of the [...]-star (gloss: break) and (that) it goes behind Jupiter: good (gloss: break).

r 1919

u EGIR dSAG.ME.GAR DUku SIG₅ ḫi-pi₂

r 2020

DUku ša₂ gi-na-a mulṣal-bat-a-nu bi-rit ḫi-pi₂

(r 20) Normal movement of Mars between (gloss: break) takes and goes: the land will experience decreased business.

r 2121

DAB-ma DUku GANBA LA₂a KUR GU₇

r 2222

mul₂dṣal-bat-<a>-nu lu-ma-šu₂ TAG.TAG GANBA SIG₅iq an-na-a

(r 22) (If) Mars makes contact with a constellation: business will be good.

(r 22) This, that is in the land, that you grasp in your hands.

r 2323

ša₂ ina KUR ša₂ ina ŠU-MIN-ka ta-ṣab-ba-tu

(colophon)
r 2424

GIM SUMUN-šu₂ SAR-ma ba-ru₃

(r 24) Written and checked according to its original.

r 2525

IM mBAša₂-a bu-kur₂ mdINANA—MU—KAM₂ ŠA₃.BAL.BAL mE₂.KUR—za-kir

(r 25) Tablet of Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-ereš, descendant of Ekur-zakir, incantation priest, Urukean, temple-enterer of Anu and Antu.

r 2626

lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ UNUGki u₂ lu₂KU₄.E₂ da-nu u an-tu₄

1the reading of DUR is unclear here. Perhaps it is a rare homophone of DIRI.

2LAL₂ is expected here, not LA₂
